description: Single, canonical validation result format (src/shared/models/validation_result.py). The docstring claims canonical status, but at least five ok-nucleus result shapes coexist across the codebase: ValidationResult (ok + errors + warnings + validated_data + metadata), ConstitutionalValidationResult (is_valid + violations + source + metadata), FixResult (ok + error_message + changes_made), ActionResult (action_id + ok + data + ...), PatternValidationResult (pattern_id + passed + violations + ...). These are candidates for a result-family reconciliation ADR. This contract governs ValidationResult's own declared shape only. Authority: ADR-056 Wave 2 Session 2.

ok.description: True if validation passed. The canonical ok-nucleus field shared across multiple result shapes in the codebase.

errors.description: List of error message strings. Default empty list.

warnings.description: List of warning message strings. Default empty list.

validated_data.description: Structured data produced by the validation (dict[str, Any]). Default empty dict.

metadata.description: Validator-specific metadata (dict[str, Any]). Default empty dict.
